name: cklph-figma-to-wp
description: Orchestrate the full Figma to WordPress/Elementor pipeline: read the design, learn existing-page conventions, tokenize, generate Elementor JSON, write to a draft, and visually verify against Figma. Thin glue over cklph-figma, cklph-elementor, cklph-wp, and cklph-visual-qa.
